---
title: "Book of Worthies, gathered from the Old Histories and now written out anew, A By the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe.”"
---

## Book of Worthies, gathered from the Old Histories and now written out anew, A By the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe.”

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1869
**Genre:** Non-fiction: history
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** London and New York: Macmillan and Company.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
